# Continuous build Changelog

- Release tag: `continuous`
- Target commit: `e1c525815396ff499fbef193fcf50f802ec08cdb`
- Previous marker: `492edf1a66d138e50370f6848c3d60c32e9e2e2c`
- Generated: 2026-07-20T12:03:30.212Z
- Compare: https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/compare/492edf1a66d138e50370f6848c3d60c32e9e2e2c...e1c525815396ff499fbef193fcf50f802ec08cdb

## Commits

- [88e336e](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/88e336e7e7b089b8f727aa9031f81781f2f76d82) Re-run gate planning and purpose refinement in scoped WFC rebuilds (#214). (#215)
- [c5880ed](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/c5880edea34a1d303ad868b969a63a177eaafd1d) Expose danger flow modes in generation config and UI (#14). (#218)
- [89795be](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/89795bedbb2acd1e8f71bee405999c8aaec9527f) Render liquids as smoothed contiguous shapes (#24). (#219)
- [e8775db](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/e8775db542838dc811d1ec9954f193046032e444) Regenerate single rooms with tag bias, safe wall re-lays, and room detail rerolls (#37, #18). (#220)
- [8361185](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/8361185aab809f3e0dbef09a4a0a10eb77846779) Bundle a pinned public monster package index with provenance gates (#84). (#207)
- [4270b2e](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/4270b2e984ff7fe29f48d43c0c301f62895b0c70) Declare runtime-emitted generation tags in tags.json. (#221)
- [d24232d](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/d24232d3837ef9b35bc7b8b79ac46724b6ad4fd4) Expand trap coverage and add pit/shaft alternates to stairs down (#16) (#222)
- [244a8c7](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/244a8c7bfbe7fa0e57520d4732cf4795defb09dd) Add route environment prep and surface the wandering procedure (#20). (#223)
- [e1c5258](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/e1c525815396ff499fbef193fcf50f802ec08cdb) Fix orphaned empty float bars from hidden floating panels (#224). (#225)
name: Continuous build
